---
title: "Advertising Responses by Question"
---

This chapter presents all platform responses for each question in the Advertising (ADS) framework, organized by category. Each table shows how platforms responded to the same question, along with their justifications.

```{python}
#| label: ads-responses
#| echo: false
#| output: asis

import sys
from pathlib import Path

project_root = Path.cwd()
while not (project_root / 'utils').exists() and project_root != project_root.parent:
    project_root = project_root.parent
if str(project_root) not in sys.path:
    sys.path.insert(0, str(project_root))

from utils.responses_aggregator import generate_responses_by_question

generate_responses_by_question(question_type="ads", year="2025")
```
